workflow.name: Research
workflow.description: Understanding user needs, business requirements, and technical constraints through stakeholder interviews and market analysis

workflow.name: Wireframes
workflow.description: Creating low-fidelity layouts and user flow diagrams to establish information architecture and navigation patterns

workflow.name: AI-Assisted Layout
workflow.description: Exploring design alternatives and generating layout variations using AI tools to accelerate the ideation process

workflow.name: UI Design
workflow.description: Crafting pixel-perfect interfaces with design systems, visual hierarchy, and brand consistency

workflow.name: Frontend Development
workflow.description: Building responsive, interactive user interfaces with modern frameworks, focusing on performance and accessibility

workflow.name: Backend Development
workflow.description: Creating robust APIs, database schemas, and server-side logic with security and scalability in mind

workflow.name: Testing
workflow.description: Comprehensive testing including unit tests, integration tests, and user acceptance testing to ensure quality

workflow.name: Deploy
workflow.description: Production deployment with monitoring, analytics, and performance optimization for reliable operation

principles.title: Enhanced, Not Replaced
principles.description: AI tools amplify human creativity and efficiency rather than replacing human judgment and decision-making.

principles.title: Strategic Application
principles.description: AI is strategically applied where it adds the most value: layout exploration, code generation, and optimization tasks.

principles.title: Human-Centered Results
principles.description: Every AI-generated output is reviewed, refined, and validated to ensure it meets user needs and quality standards.

benefits.title: Faster Iteration
benefits.description: AI-assisted exploration allows for rapid prototyping and testing of multiple design directions.

benefits.title: Higher Quality
benefits.description: More time for refinement and optimization leads to better user experiences and cleaner code.

benefits.title: Continuous Learning
benefits.description: Each project incorporates lessons learned and new AI capabilities for improved outcomes.

benefits.title: Scalable Solutions
benefits.description: Efficient workflows enable handling of complex projects while maintaining attention to detail.

design: Figma for UI design and prototyping
